stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
An aeroplane experiences a hydraulic system failure during the flight. According to the emergency procedure that must be followed for such a failure, the AFM initially advises the pilots to check slats. If the two spoiler panels on each wing are in an unknown state of extension, what is the endurance of the aeroplane?

Fuel on board: 4180 kg
Average fuel flow calculated by the FMS: 2320 kg/hr
Final Reserve Fuel: 1100 kg
